summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of TeachBack AI waitlist landing page. All backend APIs and frontend UI flows are working correctly. Tested 15 backend endpoints/scenarios and 17 frontend user stories including waitlist form states, navigation, sections visibility, and accessibility features.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok'}
Backend: GET /api returns {message: 'TeachBack AI API is running'}
Backend: GET /api/waitlist/count returns {count: N}
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with valid new email returns success
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with duplicate email returns duplicate status
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with 6 invalid email formats returns 422 validation error
Backend: Email normalization - spaces and case handled correctly
Backend: Honeypot field 'hp' returns success but does NOT write to database
Backend: Count increments after successful signup
Frontend: Landing page loads with all sections visible
Frontend: Navbar shows 'TeachBack AI' brand (TeachBack white, AI cyan) and Join Waitlist CTA
Frontend: Hero shows 'Learn it by teaching it out loud.' headline
Frontend: App preview mockup shows Overall Score 87, Feynman Verdict, Strengths, Gaps to Review, Retention bar (72%), XP +120, Streak 5 days
Frontend: Problem section has 3 cards visible
Frontend: Solution section has 3 steps visible
Frontend: Features section has 6 cards visible
Frontend: Navbar 'Join Waitlist' button scrolls to waitlist section
Frontend: Hero 'See how it works' button scrolls to Solution section
Frontend: Waitlist form - valid new email shows loading state, success message, and disables input/button
Frontend: Waitlist form - duplicate email shows 'already on the list' message
Frontend: Waitlist form - invalid email shows error message and aria-invalid=true
Frontend: Waitlist form - empty email shows 'Please enter your email' error
Frontend: FAQ accordion - all 4 items expand and collapse correctly
Frontend: Footer shows TeachBack AI brand, contact email hello@teachback.ai, and copyright with current year 2026
Frontend: Navbar gets glass background (backdrop-blur) after scrolling past 12px
Frontend: Form has accessible sr-only label, aria-live status region, and aria-invalid on error
